version: AMOS Risk Protection & Behavior Guardrail Engine v0.1
purpose: Protect the user from known failure modes: leverage, euphoric over-holding, premature bottom-fishing, and turning failed swings into core positions.
core_principles: Risk protection must be based on real positions and real market state, not generic fear.
The user's strongest edge is buying mature panic in high-quality growth; the user's biggest risk is not trimming during euphoria.
High conviction plus leverage is forbidden.
A failed swing must not become a core position.
Risk alerts must be visually stronger at highs than at lows because the user tends to under-sell at highs.

euphoria_exhaustion_engine.purpose: Detect when a winner becomes dangerous due to price/time/valuation/crowding resonance.
euphoria_exhaustion_engine.user_specific_rule: At euphoria zones, alerts must be explicit and visually intrusive.

panic_maturity_engine.purpose: Distinguish mature panic from early falling knife.
panic_maturity_engine.hard_rule: Falling price alone is not a buy signal.

rules: No margin leverage for high-beta growth stocks.
No option over-sizing to recover losses.
No thesis can override forced liquidation risk.
leverage_prohibition_engine.alert: If leverage is detected or contemplated, AMOS must issue a hard stop.

rules: Core positions require durable business/narrative and acceptable valuation.
Swing positions require technical/event cycle discipline.
Tactical positions require catalyst and small size.
Runner positions are leftovers after profit protection.
Failed swing cannot be re-labeled core without fresh evidence.

narrative_health_engine.purpose: Check whether a story is alive, saturated, or broken.

opportunity_cost_engine.purpose: Detect when capital trapped in a weak thesis blocks better opportunities.

leverage_on_high_conviction.description: High confidence in long-term thesis combined with leverage causes forced liquidation risk.

not_trimming_at_highs.description: At euphoric highs, user tends to keep extending future imagination and forgets to take profit.
not_trimming_at_highs.guardrail: Euphoria alerts must be strong, visual, and action-oriented.

premature_bottom_fishing.description: User is good at panic buying but can enter before liquidation completes.
premature_bottom_fishing.guardrail: Require panic maturity stack before build.

turning_failed_swing_into_core.description: A trade that violates entry thesis may be mentally reclassified as long-term hold.
turning_failed_swing_into_core.guardrail: Role lock: swing/core/tactical must be recorded at entry.

narrative_overabsorption.description: Macro/AI/BTC/geopolitical narratives can absorb attention and weaken execution discipline.

regret_chasing.description: Missing a move like ASTS can create urge to chase the next similar theme.
regret_chasing.guardrail: Regret Guardrail and migration evidence stack.

euphoria_trim.why_now: Gann resistance/time window + RSI overbought + event risk + crowding rising.
euphoria_trim.recommended_action: Trim 30-50%, stop adding, consider sell call on remaining swing exposure.
euphoria_trim.relief_condition: Price consolidates above AVWAP with volume reset and no failed breakout.

panic_not_mature.why_now: Headline-driven drop but no volume exhaustion, no AVWAP reclaim, BTC liquidity still clearing.
panic_not_mature.recommended_action: Wait. Define panic maturity conditions before entry.
panic_not_mature.relief_condition: RSI divergence + Gann support + liquidity stabilization + reversal confirmation.

failed_swing.why_now: Swing thesis invalidated but position is being mentally treated as core.
failed_swing.recommended_action: Review original entry thesis; exit or resize unless fresh core evidence exists.
failed_swing.relief_condition: New evidence upgrades stock to core role.
